summary: Rule chunk from The Rules page 85, chunk 4.

mechanics.raw_text:
Animals and humans appear lighter than the surrounding terrain, while a jet's contrail would be distinctly brighter. The effective range varies with the mode! number: model | — 100 m; model 1 = 1 km; model Ill — 10 kr; model IV — 10 km, 
Radio/Radar: Displays a variety of processed images indicating the location of radiotradar ‘emissions in the vicinity. Also serves as a radio receiver, Effective range varies with the model number: model | — 10 km; model I! = 100 km; model Ill — 1000 km; model IV — 5000 km,
